name: Rental Dispute Advisor
description: 处理中国租房押金不退、房东扣押金、提前退租、中介费、维修责任、涨租和退租争议；输出事实清单、证据包、赔偿估算、催告函、12315/住建委投诉路径和协商话术。

scripts.description: CLI for rental dispute analysis, compensation calculation, document generation, and escalation planning.

workflowSteps.name: Parse Dispute Scenario
workflowSteps.output: Validated dispute JSON with type classification

workflowSteps.name: Information Collection
workflowSteps.output: Structured case file with evidence inventory and timeline

workflowSteps.name: Legal Provision Matching
workflowSteps.output: Applicable laws mapped to dispute type with citations

workflowSteps.name: Responsibility Assessment
workflowSteps.output: Party-by-party responsibility breakdown with legal basis

workflowSteps.name: Compensation Calculation
workflowSteps.output: Itemized compensation report: deposit, penalty, damages

workflowSteps.name: Document Generation
workflowSteps.output: Legal document as Markdown (催告函/投诉信/起诉状)

workflowSteps.name: Evidence Checklist
workflowSteps.output: Prioritized evidence checklist with collection instructions

workflowSteps.name: Escalation Path
workflowSteps.output: Step-by-step escalation route with timeline, cost, probability

workflowSteps.name: Timeline Tracking
workflowSteps.output: Key dates timeline with follow-up reminders

steps: Prepare your dispute data as a JSON file (see SKILL.md Real Task Example 1 for template)
Run: rental-dispute.sh collect --input my-case.json — validates your input
Run: rental-dispute.sh analyze --input my-case.json — see your legal standing
Run: rental-dispute.sh calculate --input my-case.json — see your compensation
Run: rental-dispute.sh letter --type demand --input my-case.json — get your demand letter
Send the demand letter to your landlord. ~40% of disputes resolve at this step.
